title: Reject undeclared mutations and remove implicit session-task fallback
summary: Authenticated mutations now require declared work, the implicit session-task bootstrap no longer applies on the MCP mutation surface, and the updated guidance/tests validate the live server behavior.

acceptance.label: Agents learn the required bootstrap order through instructions and error messages instead of trial and error.
Any authoritative mutation without current or explicit work context is rejected with clear repair guidance.
The implicit session task fallback is removed from mutation resolution paths.
